title: PayPal Expands PYUSD Stablecoin Globally as Supply Tops $4 Billion
message_html: PayPal Expands PYUSD Stablecoin Globally as Supply Tops $4 Billion ...
snippet: PayPal’s PYUSD is expanding to a total of 70 international markets as the payments giant’s stablecoin tops a $4 billion market cap.

title: VersaBank expands tokenized deposits with cross-border FX use case
message_html: VersaBank expands tokenized deposits with cross-border FX use case ...
snippet: The Canadian bank added USD–CAD conversion to its tokenized deposits, enabling real-time cross-border transactions as banks test blockchain-based settlement systems.
